articles.title_en: Vietnam Inaugurates State-of-the-Art Wastewater Treatment Plant in Can Tho
articles.summary_en: MONRE celebrates the completion of a major wastewater treatment facility in Can Tho, enhancing water quality.

articles.title_en: MONRE Outlines National Strategy for Water Security and Wastewater Management 2026-2030
articles.summary_en: New comprehensive plan by MONRE focuses on sustainable water treatment and infrastructure nationwide.

articles.title_en: International Consortium Pledges $150M for Mekong Delta Water Treatment Projects
articles.summary_en: MONRE secures significant international funding to implement advanced water treatment solutions in the Delta.

articles.title_en: Vietnam to Fully Enforce Nationwide Solid Waste Separation by 2026
articles.summary_en: Following the 2025 deadline, strict enforcement of household waste separation begins nationwide.

articles.title_en: Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) Expands in Vietnam by 2026
articles.summary_en: New phases of EPR regulation take effect, broadening scope for packaging and electronics producers.
articles.source: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE)

articles.title_en: Local Authorities Grapple with Waste Management Enforcement Challenges
articles.summary_en: Provinces face hurdles in implementing strict waste rules due to limited infrastructure and public awareness.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $300M for Ho Chi Minh City Green Transport and Flood Resilience
articles.summary_en: ADB approved a $300M loan for HCMC's green transport and urban flood resilience, targeting 2030 completion.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Mekong Delta to Boost Renewable Energy with New ADB Funding
articles.summary_en: ADB approved a $250M loan for Vietnam's Mekong Delta to develop solar and wind energy, promoting a greener power grid.

articles.title_en: ADB Backs Northern Vietnam Economic Corridor with $400M Infrastructure Loan
articles.summary_en: ADB approved $400M to upgrade Northern Vietnam's transport links, boosting trade and regional economic integration.
articles.source: Ministry of Planning and Investment, Vietnam

articles.title_en: ADB-Funded Mekong Delta Water Security Project Phase II Launched for 2026 Implementation
articles.summary_en: ADB greenlights Phase II of a vital project in the Mekong Delta, enhancing clean water access and climate resilience by 2026.

articles.title_en: Central Vietnam Urban Wastewater Treatment Project Achieves Key 2026 Milestones
articles.summary_en: ADB-supported project in Da Nang and Hue hits 2026 targets, significantly improving urban sanitation and environmental health.

articles.title_en: Vietnam and ADB Outline 2026-2030 Strategic Plan for Rural Sanitation Expansion
articles.summary_en: A new strategic framework by Vietnam and ADB targets widespread rural clean water and sanitation access post-2026.

articles.title_en: World Bank Launches Major Mekong Delta Water Resilience Project
articles.summary_en: World Bank begins new phase for Mekong Delta: improved water supply, climate resilience for 5M residents.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Central Highlands Water Project 70% Complete with World Bank Aid
articles.summary_en: World Bank-backed 'Sustainable Water & Urban Environment Project' is 70% complete, improving water and sanitation.

articles.title_en: World Bank, Vietnam Unveil 2026-2030 Climate-Resilient Urban Water Strategy
articles.summary_en: World Bank & Vietnam unveil 2026-2030 urban water strategy. Focus: climate resilience, green infrastructure.
articles.source: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE)

articles.title_en: Hanoi Launches Green Urban Transit Expansion with Major JICA ODA Loan
articles.summary_en: Hanoi initiates a new phase of its sustainable urban transit system, bolstered by a significant JICA ODA loan aimed at reducing emissions.

articles.title_en: JICA Grant Completes Mekong Delta Environmental Resilience Project
articles.summary_en: A key environmental infrastructure project in the Mekong Delta, funded by a JICA grant, is officially completed, enhancing climate adaptation.

articles.title_en: New JICA-Vietnam Agreement Prioritizes Sustainable Water Management Funding
articles.summary_en: Vietnam and JICA sign a fresh agreement outlining future ODA grant and loan allocations for advanced water infrastructure by 2030.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Industrial Parks See Record FDI Inflow in Q1 2026, Highlighting Shift to Green Tech
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's industrial parks attracted record FDI in Q1 2026, with a strong focus on high-tech manufacturing and green energy projects, driven by new government incentives.

articles.title_en: Major Infrastructure Projects Slated for Completion in 2026 to Boost Industrial Zone Connectivity
articles.summary_en: Key expressways, deep-water ports, and energy grids are set for completion by late 2026, significantly enhancing logistics and supply chain efficiency for Vietnam's industrial parks.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Embraces Green Industrial Park Model, Attracting ESG-Conscious Investors in 2026
articles.summary_en: Government initiatives in 2026 are accelerating the development of green industrial parks with sustainable practices, drawing significant interest from ESG-focused multinational corporations.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's PDP8 Drives Offshore Wind Development, But Grid Upgrades Lag for 2026 Targets
articles.summary_en: Early 2026 sees Vietnam pushing offshore wind under PDP8, yet critical grid infrastructure upgrades remain a bottleneck for planned capacity.

articles.title_en: New DPPA Mechanisms Spark Rooftop Solar Boom in Vietnam Post-PDP8 Approval
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's rooftop solar market re-energizes in 2026 with new direct power purchase agreement frameworks aligning with PDP8 goals.

articles.title_en: International Funds Propel Vietnam's Renewable Energy Transition under PDP8 by 2026
articles.summary_en: JETP and other international investments are significantly accelerating Vietnam's PDP8 renewable energy targets, notably in wind and solar.

articles.title_en: Long Thanh International Airport Begins Trial Operations, Poised to Be Regional Hub
articles.summary_en: Long Thanh Airport Phase 1 trial operations began, marking a new era for Vietnam's regional aviation capacity.

articles.title_en: New Expressway Sections Open, Significantly Enhancing Long Thanh Airport Access
articles.summary_en: New sections of Bien Hoa-Vung Tau and HCMC-Long Thanh expressways open, enhancing airport access.

articles.title_en: HCMC Prioritizes Feasibility Study for High-Speed Metro Link to Long Thanh Airport
articles.summary_en: HCMC intensifies feasibility study for a dedicated high-speed metro link to Long Thanh International Airport.

articles.title_en: Ho Chi Minh City's Advanced Smart City IOC Achieves Full Operational Status
articles.summary_en: HCMC's state-of-the-art IOC is fully operational in 2026, integrating over 50 urban services for improved efficiency.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Boosts National Digital Infrastructure Investment for Smart City Expansion
articles.summary_en: Government commits major investment in 5G, data centers, and AI networks to power nationwide smart city growth.

articles.title_en: Da Nang's Smart City IOC Model Adopted by Multiple Provinces, Attracting Global Tech Partners
articles.summary_en: Da Nang's successful IOC project is replicated in other provinces, drawing international tech partnerships in 2026.
